<model > <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_323be72bcf62bc" label="编号" type="String" length="200" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_323be7419272be" label="申请单位" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" notNull="true" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentOrg()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_323be7460ff604" label="申请部门" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentDept()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_ORG|ORG_TYPE_DEPT);" /> <extendElementProperty name="fd_323be75a7cd20c" label="F申请人" type="com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgElement" defaultValue="OrgFunction.getCurrentUser()" formula="true" dialogJS="Dialog_Address(!{mulSelect}, '!{idField}','!{nameField}', ';',ORG_TYPE_PERSON);" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_323be75d57abbe" label="联系电话 " type="String" length="200" notNull="true" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_323be788b4aa7e" label="用印事由" type="String" length="undefined" /> <extendSubTableProperty name="fd_3246294b5671a0" label="明细表1" > <idProperty><generator type="assigned" /></idProperty> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_328f25293765da" label="文件名称" type="String" length="200" /> </extendSubTableProperty>
<extendSimpleProperty name="fd_323bf6fa0ea6c4" label="用印类型" enumValues="公章|gz;法人章|frz;签字章|qzz;亲笔签字|qbqz" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_323be7b99d0fb0" label="需提供的相关资质复印件" enumValues="营业执照|A;组织机构代码|B;税务登记证|C;法人身份证|D;开户许可证|E" type="String" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_3251f62ad2c6c8" label="需提供的相关资质复印件其他" type="String" length="200" /> <extendSimpleProperty name="fd_323be7c6991650" label="备注" type="String" length="undefined" />
</model>
